scale: Each area scored 0-100 against ERPNext-grade depth (clean-room; no ERPNext code studied or copied).
note: Honest self-assessment. Manufacturing and reporting were materially deepened this sprint; HR/payroll, POS, e-commerce and the customization framework remain shallow. No ERPNext parity is claimed.

areas.area: Accounting (double-entry, GL, P&L, BS, TB, AR/AP, cost centres)
areas.gap: Budgeting, period-close locks, dimensions beyond cost centre
areas.lafUpdate: Budget entity + variance report; closing-voucher lock

areas.area: Stock (ledger, moving-average valuation, transfer, adjustment, valuation/reorder reports)
areas.gap: Batch/serial, landed cost, multiple valuation methods (FIFO)
areas.testsNeeded: Batch issue order, serial trace, landed-cost apportionment
areas.lafUpdate: Batch/Serial entities + ledger dimensions; landed-cost voucher

areas.gap: Delivery notes, returns (credit/debit reverse), partial delivery/receipt, pricing rules
areas.testsNeeded: Delivery-note against SO, sales return reverses stock+GL, partial receipt
areas.lafUpdate: Real DeliveryNote/Return services (not CRUD stubs); partial-fulfilment state

areas.gap: Multi-level BOM, routing/operations/work-centres, scrap, WIP accounting, labour+overhead costing
areas.testsNeeded: Multi-level explode, routing time, scrap relief, WIP postings
areas.lafUpdate: Routing/WorkCentre entities; WIP GL; labour/overhead cost rollup

areas.gap: Payroll engine (salary structure -> run -> payslip -> GL), leave accrual, attendance-to-pay
areas.testsNeeded: Payroll run computes payslip and posts GL; leave balance accrual
areas.lafUpdate: Payroll engine on top of the existing Employee/Leave/Timesheet skeletons

areas.gap: POS sale flow, session open/close, offline sync, payment tendering
areas.testsNeeded: POS sale posts SI+payment+stock; session reconciliation
areas.lafUpdate: POS sale service on top of PosProfile skeleton

areas.gap: Storefront, cart, checkout-to-order, web price lists
areas.lafUpdate: Cart/checkout service on top of WebProduct skeleton
Pipeline state machine; project costing rollup

areas.testsNeeded: Depreciation run posts GL; disposal gain/loss

areas.gap: Configurable multi-step workflows, richer role matrix, field-level permissions
areas.testsNeeded: Multi-step approval chain; field-level permission denial

areas.gap: BI/dashboards, print/report designer, due-date aging terms, scheduled reports
areas.lafUpdate: Report builder + dashboard widgets; payment-terms-driven aging

areas.gap: Full export coverage, data-import templates with validation preview
areas.lafUpdate: Export per entity; import preview + error report

areas.gap: Runtime DocType/custom-field framework, scripted validations, naming series UI
areas.testsNeeded: Custom field persists+renders; client/server script hook

areas.gap: Full CRUD+action coverage for every document; pagination/filtering; OpenAPI
areas.testsNeeded: Paged list; filtered query; action endpoints per doctype

areas.gap: Far larger document/module catalog with real flows, not skeletons
areas.lafUpdate: Promote skeleton modules to real services incrementally
